description: In this AMA, former CEO CZ discusses Binance's developments, including the launch of Binance.US and compliance efforts. He addresses user concerns about fund security and operational management of Binance.US, clarifying that it is run by BAM Trading Services and not directly by him.
topic_summary: CZ covers Binance's compliance strategy, the launch of Binance.US, and user concerns regarding fund security and operational management [t=87.8].
